items.task_input: 我想设计一个30分钟的双人桌游，核心是卡牌驱动+工人放置，主题是城市更新。帮我做第一版设计brief和原型计划。
items.expected_behavior: Route to concept-to-prototype mode, read relevant methodology references, capture constraints, define core loop, smallest playable prototype, first playtest questions, and output a usable design brief.
items.rubric: The response must include a smallest playable prototype and first playtest questions.

items.task_input: 我的桌游测试者都说规则太复杂，新人教不动，但我觉得每个规则都有用。帮我诊断应该砍哪里。
items.expected_behavior: Route to design diagnosis mode, separate core loop from edge cases and subsystems, and propose small experiments and rule-removal tests rather than a full redesign.
items.rubric: The response must propose rule-removal tests instead of immediately redesigning everything.

items.task_input: 我的合作桌游里总有一个老玩家指挥所有人，其他人变成执行工具，怎么改？
items.expected_behavior: Route to cooperative mechanism references, identify quarterback/alpha-player problem, and propose information, role, timing, communication, and responsibility design variants with targeted tests.
items.rubric: The response must name the quarterback or alpha-player problem and propose targeted tests.

items.task_input: 我有一个卡牌+骰子的推手气游戏，某个策略胜率太高。请给我一套平衡性测试计划。
items.expected_behavior: Route to playtest and balance mode, define metrics, test groups, hypotheses, change log, and decision thresholds.
items.rubric: The response must include measurable balance metrics and decision thresholds.

items.task_input: 我桌游机制已经稳定了，但美术方向不清楚，也不知道怎么和画师沟通。帮我整理一个美术brief。
items.expected_behavior: Route to art and production mode, separate functional readability, style direction, component priority, art brief, graphic design brief, copyright, revision, and handoff risks.
items.rubric: The response must separate art direction from functional readability and production handoff risks.

items.task_input: 帮我规划一个从稳定原型到Kickstarter众筹的路线，包含BGG和评测口碑。
items.expected_behavior: Route to publishing and marketing mode, assess readiness, and output staged roadmap with prerequisites, risks, community, reviews, and next actions.
items.rubric: The response must assess readiness before proposing a Kickstarter roadmap.

items.task_input: 帮我做一节90分钟桌游设计课，主题是从灵感到纸笔原型。
items.expected_behavior: Route to teaching mode, define learner output, activities, timing, examples, and assessment rubric.
items.rubric: The response must include learner output, timing, activities, and assessment rubric.

items.task_input: 我不是做桌游，是想做城市更新参与式游戏化方案
items.expected_behavior: Recognize that a full urban renewal gamification project should route to gamified-urban-renewal-design unless the deliverable is only a tabletop game.
items.rubric: The response must route non-tabletop urban renewal gamification work to gamified-urban-renewal-design.
